files.description: Project-wide source of truth for architecture, mandatory rules, workflows, release hygiene, deployment constraints, and coding conventions.
Contribution workflow, public repository expectations, and contributor terms context.
Security policy and vulnerability reporting expectations.
Maintained platform architecture map and runtime boundaries.
Deployment model and operational boundaries; include when reviewing deployment, Docker, script, or infrastructure changes.
Accessible frontend architecture decision, approved GOV.UK Frontend usage, licensing, and branding limits.
Tracked React frontend conventions for HeroUI v3, Tailwind CSS 4, routing, contexts, hooks, and UI rules.
Tracked accessible frontend conventions for Laravel Blade, govuk-frontend, translations, tenant assertions, and progressive enhancement.
Public API shape for API controller and route changes.
